description: Configure bcWebCam for background scanning. 1) Open the settings/options dialog. 2) Enable the global hotkey feature and set the trigger key to 'F10'. 3) Locate the setting for application behavior after a successful scan and change it to end reading and minimize the application. 4) Take a screenshot of the configured settings dialog and save it to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\hotkey_configured.png' before closing the dialog. 5) Apply/Save the settings.
